title: READ PLAY TALKGROUPS - 211info
text: SOUTHERN OREGON EARLY LEARNING SERVICES HUB READ PLAY TALKGROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in, early learning play group. 310 Southwest H Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Preschool-age children and their parents or caregivers. Younger siblings welcome at meetings. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 776-8590 1145 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 776-8590 Ext: 1145 Main phone (541) 776-8590 Ext: 1154 Alternate Main phone (541) 776-8590 ext 1145 Teresa Slater [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Children's Play Groups Parent/Child Activity Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
